items.title: EcoFlow’s final March power station flash sale drops 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra to $1,099 + 4,096Wh DELTA Pro 3 to $2,099, more
items.summary:
As part of its ongoing Spring Sale event on power stations, which is running parallel to Amazon’s ongoing Big Spring Sale, EcoFlow has launched the final 48-hour flash sale of March, which cuts up to 61% off the tags for two power stations, a DELTA Pro expansion battery, and a portable AC/heater. Among the two backup power solutions, this 48-hour window lets you jump on the extremely versatile EcoFlow DELTA Pro 3 4,096Wh Portable Power Station at $2,099 shipped, matching its current Amazon spring sale pricing. While we have seen the price spike up to its $3,699 MSRP a few times in 2026, it’s more often kept down between $2,299 and $3,066 most of the time in the new year, with today’s rate beaten out by falls to $1,999, as well as a one-time drop to its latest $1,899 low back in mid-January. For the next two days, you can grab one with a 43% markdown that cuts $1,600 off the tag for the third-lowest price we have tracked (and the second-lowest recurring discount). Of course, if you want to save a bit more for a smaller unit, the 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra Portable Power Station is down at its second-lowest $1,099 rate, beating out Amazon by $100. Head below for the other flash offers while they’re still live.

more…
